name: skillspell
author: Arnold Simha
description: SkillSpell - Create, modify, and optimize AI agent skills using natural language

scripts.storage:build: npm run shared:build && npm run build -w packages/storage/postgres
scripts.backend:dev: npm run storage:build && concurrently -n shared,postgres,nest -c blue,magenta,green "npm run build:watch -w packages/shared" "npm run build:watch -w packages/storage/postgres" "portless api.skillspell npm run start:dev -w packages/backend"
scripts.backend:build: npm run storage:build && npm run build -w packages/backend
scripts.frontend:dev: portless skillspell npm run dev -w packages/frontend
scripts.mail:up: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --profile tools up mailpit -d
scripts.mail:down: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --profile tools stop mailpit
scripts.otel:up: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --profile tools up aspire -d
scripts.otel:down: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --profile tools stop aspire
scripts.saml:up: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --profile saml up keycloak -d
scripts.saml:down: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --profile saml stop keycloak
scripts.build: npm run backend:build && npm run frontend:build
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/backend && npm run lint -w packages/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/backend && npm run test -w packages/frontend
scripts.docker:up:all: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --profile app --profile tools up -d --build
scripts.docker:prod:up: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml -f docker/docker-compose.prod.yml --profile app up -d --build
scripts.docker:prod:down: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml -f docker/docker-compose.prod.yml --profile app down
